mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_order(recharge_no, user_id, tier_id, pay_fen, bonus_fen, status, credited, prepay_requested, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{rechargeNo}, #{userId}, #{tierId}, #{payFen}, #{bonusFen}, #{status}, #{credited}, #{prepayRequested}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recharge_order WHERE recharge_no = #{rechargeNo} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_order SET status = 'PAID', update_time = NOW() WHERE recharge_no = #{rechargeNo} AND status = 'CREATED' AND deleted = 0
UPDATE recharge_order SET credited = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE recharge_no = #{rechargeNo} AND status = 'PAID' AND credited = 0 AND deleted = 0
UPDATE recharge_order SET prepay_requested = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE recharge_no = #{rechargeNo} AND status = 'CREATED' AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recharge_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
